_comment: Fast per-PR mutation lane. Scoped to the small, pure faithfulness + quality core so a full run is quick enough to gate every PR (the broad route/ascii lanes stay nightly). Run with `--since <base-ref>` to mutate only files changed in the PR; without it, the whole (small) set runs. Gates via thresholds.break — a survived mutant here is a real test gap in the highest-leverage new logic.
_thresholds_note: Measured 96.46% (109/113 killed) over the structural-count core + faithfulnessWarning + isDrop + rankWarnings. The 4 remaining survivors are equivalent mutants on the opaque/default null-returning branches (see docs/mutation-testing.md §incremental). break=90 leaves headroom for those 4 while failing any real regression. CI runs with `--since <base>` so only files changed in the PR are mutated.
